message.content:
@startuml
actor Actor

participant "«Analysis»\nUIConditionalFormattingCellExtension" as A
participant "«Analysis»\nUIConditionalFormattingCellSideBarExtension" as B
participant "«Analysis»\nConditionalFormattingCellPanel" as C

Actor -> A : starts use case
A -> B : create()
B -> C : create()
C -> Actor : shows side bar

@enduml
